key.name: shortcut-new-session
key.summary: Keyboard shortcut to open a new Claude Code session
key.description: Keyboard shortcut that launches a new Claude Code terminal in the home directory.

key.name: terminal-command
key.description: Terminal command used to launch new Claude Code sessions (e.g. kitty, gnome-terminal, alacritty).

key.name: new-session-cwd
key.description: Directory where new Claude Code sessions are opened. Empty means $HOME.

key.name: refresh-interval-seconds
key.description: How often to poll session state and verify PIDs are alive.

key.name: show-desktop-notifications
key.description: Whether to show desktop notifications when Claude Code is waiting for your input.

key.name: notify-on-thinking-done
key.description: Whether to show a notification when a session transitions from working to idle.
